nasb.text: He blessed Joseph, and said, “The God before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac walked, The God who has been my shepherd all my life to this day,

esv.text: And he blessed Joseph and said, “The God before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac walked, the God who has been my shepherd all my life long to this day,

cnv.text: 他祝福約瑟，說： “願我祖亞伯拉罕和以撒所侍候的　神， 一生牧養我直到今日的　神，

ccb.text: 他祝福约瑟说：“愿我祖先亚伯拉罕和以撒敬拜的上帝，牧养我一生直到今天的上帝，

csbs.text: 以色列祝福约瑟说： “愿我祖父亚伯拉罕和我父以撒所跟随的神， 就是牧养我一生直到今日的神，
